gt_sql: SELECT T2.colour FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id WHERE T1.full_name = 'Karen Beecher-Duncan'
pred_sql: SELECT colour.colour FROM superhero JOIN colour ON superhero.eye_colour_id = colour.id WHERE superhero.full_name = 'Karen Beecher-Duncan';
question: Provide the eye colour of the superhero who has Karen Beecher-Duncan as their full name.
